body:
## Changelog
### New Features
* 805afa2bc6fbfe43366a5c234b6148a6b94890f7: feat: modernize codebase with Go 1.26, CI improvements, and upstream fixes - Update Go version from 1.15 to 1.26 across Dockerfile and workflows - Replace custom GitHub Actions with standard official actions   - .github/actions/setup-go -> actions/setup-go@v5   - .github/actions/docker-build-cache -> actions/cache/restore@v4 - Add Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates - Upgrade GitHub Actions to latest versions (build-push-action@v6, etc.) - Pull upstream fixes from SimplicityGuy/podgrab (2026-02-22):   - Fix E2E test flakiness with Chrome pre-warming   - Fix golangci-lint warnings and gosec nolint annotations   - Fix CI failures in cleanup workflow - Enhance docker-compose.yml with security options and version 3.8 - Add comprehensive Makefile with build, test, and release targets - Update dependencies to latest versions in go.mod - Cherry-picked commits from variety of other recently-ish updated forks   of podgrab for additional fixes/functionality (James Tooze <toozej@gmail.com>)
### Bug fixes
* d241fbd6d918ed78387c0dfa674a80f459d0a140: fix: continue on Snyk test failure (James Tooze <toozej@gmail.com>)
* 2e9be99312b42ecb6bc848350d7dacc5fa56589d: fix: semgrep + snyk findings (James Tooze <toozej@gmail.com>)
* 4c8f0293e7a481ec0bf3c57cf4496941ca26a27d: fix: validate workflow file permissions (James Tooze <toozej@gmail.com>)
### Other work
* ebb323819dbee517a1720a212bd971393737c8ea: 1. Download all works instantly 2. Display queue status (Akhil Gupta <akhil.gupta@faballey.com>)
* cc5ca61bdbe3e28cb366deb5b151d351012ed0a3: Add CLAUDE.md with architecture documentation and development guide (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 734f25a84567ba9a363d4a799d33ebd7d277b72b: Add compiled binaries to .gitignore (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 337b92c6d319112f6f76b4c8f2ee2e02373b221c: Add comprehensive README.md with badges, documentation links, and development guide (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* cc8b3b604b4ae660edf7dab7c2348776335db1c7: Add comprehensive documentation with architecture diagrams (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 343d281808e14377ad6f99d5b61b4f36d38bd00b: Add comprehensive implementation summary documenting all 7 phases (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 9a4bcfb5c3544e5b625ca3aa96b36767935efc16: Add comprehensive test infrastructure and test suite (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 2fb1323609ff04a7778bd8ff655a0c56d9b24e96: Add comprehensive testing and CI/CD documentation (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 352d8da5eb03a1511c5dc5e5c4bc8aa534efe60d: Add comprehensive update script for all project dependencies (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 1531c7aba25ab94c99af8226568d7a91b9a6d2c7: Add enterprise-grade CI/CD workflows (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* c19b8e9b96cd0fecb75812170c4893e37833cc56: Add golangci-lint v2.8.0 configuration and fix critical linting issues (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 53ce71671d13b4bd84892705d51b64bb42957149: Add pre-commit hooks and linting configuration (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 4099c03dd8e1f40a20aecc494d45fc986d54eb46: Add shellcheck, shfmt, actionlint, and JSON schema validation to pre-commit (Robert Wlodarczyk <robert@simplicityguy.com>)
* 0e8453c2023dda82cf421edf472053a90258d6bb: Adding ability to specify `User-Agent` header (James Luck <james.luck@thetradedesk.com>)
* d9925a3cf694fb3d8eb0ac93b10c71efb813a0ab: Adding ability to specify the maximum download concurrency for the download missing episodes functionality. Defaults to `5` (the current hardcoded value). (James Luck <james.luck@thetradedesk.com>)
